name: abdian/laravel-upload-guard
description: Secure file upload validation for Laravel — fail-closed scanning for polyglot web shells, malicious PDFs/SVGs, zip bombs, Office macros, and spoofed MIME types.

suggest.ext-exif: Enables EXIF metadata inspection/stripping in the image scanner; the scanner degrades gracefully without it.
suggest.ext-gd: Required for the optional image re-encode mode that strips embedded payloads.
suggest.ext-imagick: Alternative backend for the optional image re-encode mode.

ignore.PKSA-mdq4-51ck-6kdq: Laravel framework advisory affects the dev test toolchain only; not a runtime dependency of this package.
ignore.PKSA-8qx3-n5y5-vvnd: Laravel framework advisory affects the dev test toolchain only; not a runtime dependency of this package.
ignore.PKSA-w7xr-vk7n-rstm: Laravel framework advisory affects the dev test toolchain only; not a runtime dependency of this package.
ignore.PKSA-4g5g-4rkv-myqs: Local audit DB flags every published enshrined/svg-sanitize version; pinned to the latest available release.
